body_txt: Girls With Guns describes a Sub-Genre of action media that focuses on strong female leads being awesome with firearms. May or may not involve Heroic Bloodshed . It was developed somewhere in the Hong Kong film industry and has since made itself a genre that is often used in anime . Usually involves gun fights, stunts and martial arts. Older works from this genre will always have a cast of hot women , though this has been less stringent in more recent years thanks to the rising of Moe aesthetics. Small Girl, Big Gun is a Sub-Trope —Girls With Guns aren't necessarily small, and their guns aren't necessarily big. Yeah-heh. Compare Superhero Packing Heat and Military Moe . See also The Other Wiki 's page on the subject. Note that this page describes a genre, not a character trope. Individual examples of Girls With Guns go on The Gunslinger .
